## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in on client progress, pipeline issues, and new workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/yn_Qy5ywarzitUZKoaWM17LuqWp7d8MK?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Udemy Pipeline Issues:** The pipeline generates factual errors (e.g., a partnership misidentified as a case study) and excessive jargon. Simran will file a batch of tickets to provide comprehensive, actionable feedback to engineering.](https://fathom.video/share/yn_Qy5ywarzitUZKoaWM17LuqWp7d8MK?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [**Understory Publishing Workflow:** Simran now owns the Sanity publishing workflow. The immediate task is to audit all published articles and add missing categories to enable the site's new filtered navigation.](https://fathom.video/share/yn_Qy5ywarzitUZKoaWM17LuqWp7d8MK?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
  - [**Strategic Expansion:** Simran will take on keyword research for Understory next week, building toward full ownership of content calendar strategy. A keyword research training session will be proposed for the next pod-wide call.](https://fathom.video/share/yn_Qy5ywarzitUZKoaWM17LuqWp7d8MK?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)
  - [**New Udemy Reporting:** Simran now has access to the Udemy Looker dashboard and will add weekly URL updates to the workflow. The "referral" and "not set" traffic sources will be included in organic analysis, as they capture LLM and un-attributed organic traffic, respectively.](https://fathom.video/share/yn_Qy5ywarzitUZKoaWM17LuqWp7d8MK?tab=summary&timestamp=1877.0)

## Topics

### Udemy: Pipeline Issues & Strategic Context

  - [**Pipeline Quality Issues:**](https://fathom.video/share/yn_Qy5ywarzitUZKoaWM17LuqWp7d8MK?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
      - [**Factual Errors:** The pipeline invents details, such as misidentifying a partnership with BetterWorks as a case study.](https://fathom.video/share/yn_Qy5ywarzitUZKoaWM17LuqWp7d8MK?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
          - [**Significance:** This is a critical bug, as it creates content that is factually incorrect.](https://fathom.video/share/yn_Qy5ywarzitUZKoaWM17LuqWp7d8MK?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
      - [**Excessive Jargon:** Drafts still require significant post-processing in Claude to simplify technical language (e.g., AWS, cloud computing).](https://fathom.video/share/yn_Qy5ywarzitUZKoaWM17LuqWp7d8MK?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [**Feedback Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/yn_Qy5ywarzitUZKoaWM17LuqWp7d8MK?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
      - [Simran will file a single, comprehensive ticket with engineering (Nick) after this week's edits are complete.](https://fathom.video/share/yn_Qy5ywarzitUZKoaWM17LuqWp7d8MK?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
      - [**Rationale:** A batch of feedback provides a clearer, more generalizable picture of pipeline behavior than isolated, one-off tickets.](https://fathom.video/share/yn_Qy5ywarzitUZKoaWM17LuqWp7d8MK?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
  - [**Strategic Context:**](https://fathom.video/share/yn_Qy5ywarzitUZKoaWM17LuqWp7d8MK?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
      - [Udemy's renewal is in April; high content quality is essential for February strategy talks.](https://fathom.video/share/yn_Qy5ywarzitUZKoaWM17LuqWp7d8MK?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
      - [**New Content Formats:** Infographics are being introduced to create AI-friendly snippets. Simran will file tickets to integrate them.](https://fathom.video/share/yn_Qy5ywarzitUZKoaWM17LuqWp7d8MK?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)

### Understory: New Publishing Workflow & Content Audit

  - [**Sanity Publishing Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/yn_Qy5ywarzitUZKoaWM17LuqWp7d8MK?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
      - [Simran now owns the Sanity publishing process, replacing Suleman.](https://fathom.video/share/yn_Qy5ywarzitUZKoaWM17LuqWp7d8MK?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The auto-publish feature requires a new owner for post-publish checks and manual adjustments.](https://fathom.video/share/yn_Qy5ywarzitUZKoaWM17LuqWp7d8MK?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
      - [**Process:** Log in via 1Password → `Posts` → Verify all metadata (title, slug, excerpt, category, author, image alt text) and formatting.](https://fathom.video/share/yn_Qy5ywarzitUZKoaWM17LuqWp7d8MK?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [**Immediate Task: Content Audit:**](https://fathom.video/share/yn_Qy5ywarzitUZKoaWM17LuqWp7d8MK?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)
      - [**Goal:** Audit all published articles in Sanity to identify and add missing categories.](https://fathom.video/share/yn_Qy5ywarzitUZKoaWM17LuqWp7d8MK?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This enables the site's new filtered navigation, improving user experience and content discoverability.](https://fathom.video/share/yn_Qy5ywarzitUZKoaWM17LuqWp7d8MK?tab=summary&timestamp=978.0)
      - [**Method:** Export a list of all posts from Sanity and use Claude to cross-reference with the original assignments.](https://fathom.video/share/yn_Qy5ywarzitUZKoaWM17LuqWp7d8MK?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)

### Process & Strategic Alignment

  - [**Content OS Standardization:**](https://fathom.video/share/yn_Qy5ywarzitUZKoaWM17LuqWp7d8MK?tab=summary&timestamp=1710.0)
      - [The "Week" column in the content calendar will be standardized across all accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/yn_Qy5ywarzitUZKoaWM17LuqWp7d8MK?tab=summary&timestamp=1710.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This improves organization, clarifies review cycles for clients, and simplifies internal tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/yn_Qy5ywarzitUZKoaWM17LuqWp7d8MK?tab=summary&timestamp=1710.0)
  - [**Keyword Research & Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/yn_Qy5ywarzitUZKoaWM17LuqWp7d8MK?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)
      - [Simran will begin keyword research for Understory next week.](https://fathom.video/share/yn_Qy5ywarzitUZKoaWM17LuqWp7d8MK?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)
      - [**Goal:** Build toward Simran owning the content calendar strategy, with Katya reviewing.](https://fathom.video/share/yn_Qy5ywarzitUZKoaWM17LuqWp7d8MK?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)
      - [**Action:** Simran proposed a pod-wide training session on keyword research, which Katya will consider for a future call.](https://fathom.video/share/yn_Qy5ywarzitUZKoaWM17LuqWp7d8MK?tab=summary&timestamp=1681.0)
  - [**Udemy Looker Dashboard:**](https://fathom.video/share/yn_Qy5ywarzitUZKoaWM17LuqWp7d8MK?tab=summary&timestamp=1877.0)
      - [Simran now has access to the Udemy Looker dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/yn_Qy5ywarzitUZKoaWM17LuqWp7d8MK?tab=summary&timestamp=1877.0)
      - [**Weekly Task:** Update URLs in Looker for each new batch of content.](https://fathom.video/share/yn_Qy5ywarzitUZKoaWM17LuqWp7d8MK?tab=summary&timestamp=1888.0)
      - [**Traffic Source Analysis:**](https://fathom.video/share/yn_Qy5ywarzitUZKoaWM17LuqWp7d8MK?tab=summary&timestamp=2028.0)
          - [**"Referral":** Include in organic analysis; it captures LLM traffic (e.g., ChatGPT, Claude).](https://fathom.video/share/yn_Qy5ywarzitUZKoaWM17LuqWp7d8MK?tab=summary&timestamp=2028.0)
          - [**"Not Set":** Include in organic analysis; it is a frequent bucket for un-attributed organic traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/yn_Qy5ywarzitUZKoaWM17LuqWp7d8MK?tab=summary&timestamp=2110.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Simran:**](https://fathom.video/share/yn_Qy5ywarzitUZKoaWM17LuqWp7d8MK?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
      - [File a comprehensive ticket for Nick detailing Udemy pipeline issues (jargon, factual errors).](https://fathom.video/share/yn_Qy5ywarzitUZKoaWM17LuqWp7d8MK?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
      - [Audit Understory articles in Sanity and add missing categories.](https://fathom.video/share/yn_Qy5ywarzitUZKoaWM17LuqWp7d8MK?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)
      - [Add weekly URL updates to the Udemy Looker dashboard to the workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/yn_Qy5ywarzitUZKoaWM17LuqWp7d8MK?tab=summary&timestamp=1888.0)
      - [Begin keyword research for Understory next week.](https://fathom.video/share/yn_Qy5ywarzitUZKoaWM17LuqWp7d8MK?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)
  - [**Katya:**](https://fathom.video/share/yn_Qy5ywarzitUZKoaWM17LuqWp7d8MK?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)
      - [Provide new Udemy assignments by tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/yn_Qy5ywarzitUZKoaWM17LuqWp7d8MK?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)
      - [Propose a pod-wide keyword research training session for a future call.](https://fathom.video/share/yn_Qy5ywarzitUZKoaWM17LuqWp7d8MK?tab=summary&timestamp=1681.0)
